div.p: In vector database benchmarking (ANN-Benchmarks), Recall@k measures retrieval quality.

ol.li: Query ANN Index (e.g., HNSW) to get approx_neighbors.
Cast both to HashSets for O(1) intersection check.

div.p: Extract the top-k results from the Ground Truth (Brute Force) index and the Approximate (HNSW) index.
Perform logical intersection: Hits = S_exact ∩ S_approx. Identify elements present in the Ground Truth set that were successfully retrieved by the ANN index.
Calculate numerator and denominator for the recall ratio. n = |Hits| k = |S_exact|
The ratio represents the percentage of true neighbors correctly identified. Recall@k = n / k
